hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-zinc-950

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border-zinc-200, no shadow by default. On hover: shadow-lg, -translate-y-1, border-zinc-300.
surface_strategies.live_hackathon_cards: Apply 'The Tracing Beam' (Linear/Aceternity look) with a subtle glowing border mask to indicate active/live events.
surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl, 1px bottom border border-black/10.
surface_strategies.dashboard_grid: Grid Borders: use border-collapse style layouts for dense data, with border-r and border-b on items.

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use p-8 to p-12 for major containers to give breathing room. For dense data, use p-4 to p-6.

grid_modes.hero_marketing: MODE A (Tetris Grid): Asymmetric bento grid for stats and featured hackathons. Wide gaps (gap-8).
grid_modes.listings: MODE B (Control Room Grid): Dense layout for tracking lists, gap-4 to gap-6, 100% height utilization.

components_instructions.general: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural/marketing layouts. Use Shadcn UI for interactive elements.
components_instructions.buttons: Flat, hard corners or slightly rounded (rounded-md), strong contrast hover states (hover:bg-zinc-900 hover:text-white).
components_instructions.filters_search: Use Shadcn Select, Input, and Tabs. Customise with JetBrains Mono font and square corners.
components_instructions.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for a 'Kinetic Texture' showing live 'Registration Open' or 'Newly Added' hackathons.
components_instructions.ai_assistant: Floating or side-panel chat UI using Shadcn Card and ScrollArea. Give it a distinct background tint (e.g., bg-blue-50/50) to differentiate from main content.
components_instructions.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a dense, professional developer tool look.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have explicit hover states altering background and text color.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for basic interactions. Use framer-motion for page entrances.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus states have high contrast (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600).

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='search-input', data-testid='apply-button').
